domain: wheat threshing + winnowing (threshing loosens grain from chaff via mechanical agitation; winnowing tosses mixture into wind so dense grain falls vertically and light chaff blows aside)
specific_mechanism: Two-stage cheap separation: agitation loosens, then uniform external force separates by scalar density.
llm_application: TWDF: agitation pass (token shuffles + paraphrase) measures embedding shift to detect loose-attached docs; winnowing pass uses scalar density-of-information score (single lightweight metric) to blow aside low-density docs. Purely scalar, no per-doc LLM judge.
novelty_claim: Quality-Gated Corpus Refinement (2602.09875), REWIRE (2506.04689), Multilingual LLM Filter (2505.22232) use expensive LLM-judge. TWDF is purely scalar-density + agitation-shift filter without per-doc judge.
